deliverables: scripts/check_claim_register.py -- AST walk + backtick-token cross-reference + `# claim: NAME` marker scan + `# claim-exempt: reason` in-line opt-out. Exit codes: 0 clean, 1 unregistered, 2 usage. Supports --json, --quiet, --fail-on-orphan.
scripts/git-hooks/pre-commit -- 5-line bash shim, marker `blue-lock:claim-register-audit:v1`, runs the audit in --quiet mode.
scripts/install_git_hooks.py -- opt-in installer, idempotent, backs up foreign hooks to pre-commit.bak, refuses to remove non-Blue-Lock hooks, supports --dry-run + --uninstall.

tests/platform/test_claim_register_audit.py -- 9 tests (spec asked 8; +1 for --dry-run coverage). Every case in the spec + the red-line SPARE_CLAIM diagnostic + installer idempotency + foreign-hook backup + JSON output shape.

company/legal/claim_register.md -- register missing pre-Sprint-2 accessors (is_setup_complete, set_current_step, set_default_pairs, get_default_pairs, validate_passphrase, is_install_configured, check_request_token, list_players) and document exempt classes (credentials setup helpers, auth logging plumbing, broker test helper).
agent/platform/{credentials,broker_connection,auth}.py -- inline `# claim-exempt: <reason>` markers on 9 internal helpers.
delta_note: 9 tests added, but 1 previously-collected test moved to a skipped state under the current playwright cache -- net +8 in passing count.
